proposition: Tomáš Melichárek is sole owner and jednatel of M&M plan s.r.o. (IČO 01812840) since 2013, and co-jednatel of FaMe logistics s.r.o. v likvidaci alongside Václav Faraga and Petr Faraga. An enforcement (exekuce) proceeding recorded against the M&M plan director shows as closed as of 16 April 2026.
shortTitle: Tomáš Melichárek is sole owner and jednatel of M&M plan s.r.o.…
statusExplanation: Podpořeno více nezávisle vzniklými rodinami zdrojů. Pozor: dvě zrcadla téže autority nejsou nezávislé potvrzení.
